product_updates.title: DiligenceSquared uses AI, voice agents to make M&A research affordable
product_updates.content: Instead of relying on expensive management consultants, the startup uses AI voice agents to conduct interviews with customers of the companies the PE firms are considering buying.

product_updates.title: AWS launches a new AI agent platform specifically for healthcare
product_updates.content: AWS is launching Amazon Connect Health, an AI agent platform that will help with patient scheduling, documentation, and patient verification.

product_updates.title: US reportedly considering sweeping new chip export controls
product_updates.content: In an alleged drafted proposal, the U.S. government would play a role in every chip export sale regardless of which country it's coming from.

product_updates.title: It’s official: The Pentagon has labeled Anthropic a supply-chain risk
product_updates.content: The Department of Defense has officially labeled Anthropic a supply-chain risk, making the AI firm the first American company with the label. Meanwhile, the DOD continues to use Anthropic's AI in Iran.

product_updates.title: EXCLUSIVE: Luma launches creative AI agents powered by its new ‘Unified Intelligence’ models
product_updates.content: Luma introduced Luma Agents, powered by its new “Unified Intelligence” models, designed to coordinate multiple AI systems and generate end-to-end creative work across text, images, video and audio.

product_updates.title: OpenAI launches GPT-5.4 with Pro and Thinking versions
product_updates.content: GPT-5.4 is billed as "our most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work."

product_updates.title: Cursor is rolling out a new kind of agentic coding tool
product_updates.content: Called Automations, the new system gives users a way to automatically launch agents within their coding environment, triggered by a new addition to the codebase, a Slack message, or a simple timer.

product_updates.title: Meta sued over AI smart glasses’ privacy concerns, after workers reviewed nudity, sex, and other footage
product_updates.content: Lawyers say Meta's marketing materials promised privacy and user control over sharing footage. But an investigation found that subcontractors are reviewing footage from customers' glasses.

product_updates.title: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei could still be trying to make a deal with Pentagon
product_updates.content: Anthropic's $200 million contract with the Department of Defense broke down due to disagreements over giving the military unrestricted access to its AI.

product_updates.title: Netflix buys Ben Affleck’s AI filmmaking company InterPositive
product_updates.content: InterPositive isn't trying to make AI actors or synthetic performances. Rather, the company has created a model that helps production teams work with footage from their own productions to help make edits in post-production.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Trump gets data center companies to pledge to pay for power generation
technical_breakthroughs.content: With no enforcement and questionable economics, it may not make a difference.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: an AI agent’s hit piece, and preventing lightning
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. technical_breakthroughs.title: How much wildfire prevention is too much?
technical_breakthroughs.content: The race to prevent the worst wildfires has been an increasingly high-tech one. Companies are proposing AI fire detection systems and drones that can stamp out early blazes. And now, one Canadian startup says it’s going after lightning. Lightning-sparked fires can be a big deal: The Canadian wild…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Online harassment is entering its AI era
technical_breakthroughs.content: Scott Shambaugh didn’t think twice when he denied an AI agent’s request to contribute to matplotlib, a software library that he helps manage. Like many open-source projects, matplotlib has been overwhelmed by a glut of AI code contributions, and so Shambaugh and his fellow maintainers have instit…
